projectDescription: A high-performance, AI-assisted presentation editing platform that lets users create polished slideshows through natural language interaction.
keyFeatures: AI-assisted slide creation via natural language (powered by Anthropic Claude)
Rich block types: explainer, code, diagram, chart, KPI, gantt, table, layers, metrics grid, objectives, image
End-to-end type-safe RPC API using ORPC between frontend and backend
Standalone cross-platform binary for portable deployment (macOS, Linux, Windows)
Concept-based slide categorization with color-coded themes
Patch-based slideshow state management with digest-based staleness detection
Real-time JSON slideshow persistence to local filesystem
Monorepo with shared TypeScript packages for domain logic and API contracts
publicApiSurface: slideshowAssistant — POST /rpc: Send a natural language request to the AI assistant to modify slideshows
slideshowLoad — POST /rpc: Load slideshows from the filesystem, optionally filtered by dataset ID
slideshowSave — POST /rpc: Save slideshows to the filesystem with digest-based conflict detection
Slideshow schema (TypeBox/Zod): { id, title, concepts, slides }
Slide schema: { id, order, concept, explanation, blocks }
Block schema: { explainer, codeBlock, diagram, gantt, table, chart, kpi, kpiGrid, radialMetric, layers, metricsGrid, objectivesDisplay, image }
